title: Dryopteris buchananii
taxonomy: Dryopteris buchananii is classified as a species of fern in the genus Dryopteris and family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the division Pteridophyta and is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales. The class of this fern is Polypodiopsida, and its phylum is Pteridophyta. At the kingdom level, it is classified as Plantae, and the domain is Eukaryota. The overall classification reflects the fern's position within the plant kingdom.

intro: Dryopteris buchananii, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae.
